positive: Retro 8-bit vaporwave illustration of a futuristic cityscape viewed from a rooftop at sunset. Palm trees, neon signs with Japanese characters, flying cars, and geometric patterns dominate the scene. Synthwave aesthetic, grainy texture, magenta and cyan color palette, vector art style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
